original: Many people talked of the 288,000 new jobs the Labor Department reported for June, along with the drop in the unemployment rate to 6.1 percent, as good news.
translation_literal: 许多人把劳工部报告的6月份新增28.8万个工作岗位，以及失业率降至6.1%，称为好消息。

chunks.english: the 288,000 new jobs the Labor Department reported for June
chunks.chinese: 劳工部报告的6月份新增28.8万个工作岗位
chunks.relation: 作 talked of 的宾语

chunks.english: along with the drop in the unemployment rate to 6.1 percent
chunks.relation: 与 new jobs 一起构成谈论内容
说明人们如何看待这些数据

chunks.english: the Labor Department reported for June
the drop in the unemployment rate to 6.1 percent

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 宾语与补足语被插入成分隔开
sentence_patterns.explanation: talked of 的宾语很长，as good news 才是对宾语的评价补足。

original: And they were right.
translation_literal: 而他们是对的。

original: For now it appears the economy is creating jobs at a decent pace.
translation_literal: 目前看来，经济正在以不错的速度创造就业岗位。

chunks.english: the economy is creating jobs at a decent pace
chunks.chinese: 经济正在以不错的速度创造就业岗位
chunks.relation: 真正主语/appears 后的内容

chunks.english: the economy is creating jobs at a decent pace
chunks.chinese: 经济正在以不错速度创造就业岗位

sentence_patterns.explanation: it 是形式主语，真正内容是 the economy is creating jobs...。

original: We still have a long way to go to get back to full employment, but at least we are now finally moving forward at a faster pace.
translation_literal: 我们仍然还有很长的路要走才能回到充分就业，但至少我们现在终于正以更快的速度前进。

chunks.english: We still have a long way to go to get back to full employment
chunks.chinese: 我们仍然还有很长的路要走才能回到充分就业

chunks.english: but at least we are now finally moving forward at a faster pace
chunks.chinese: 但至少我们现在终于正以更快的速度前进

original: However, there is another important part of the jobs picture that was largely overlooked.
translation_literal: 然而，就业图景中还有另一个重要部分在很大程度上被忽视了。

chunks.english: there is another important part of the jobs picture
chunks.chinese: 就业图景中还有另一个重要部分
在很大程度上被忽视的

original: There was a big jump in the number of people who report voluntarily working part-time.
translation_literal: 报告自愿兼职工作的人数出现了大幅增长。

chunks.english: There was a big jump in the number of people

original: This figure is now 830,000(4.4 percent) above its year ago level.
translation_literal: 这个数字现在比一年前的水平高出83万（4.4%）。

chunks.english: 830,000 (4.4 percent) above its year ago level
chunks.chinese: 比一年前的水平高出83万（4.4%）

original: Before explaining the connection to the Obamacare, it is worth making an important distinction.
translation_literal: 在解释与奥巴马医改的联系之前，作出一个重要区分是值得的。

chunks.english: Before explaining the connection to the Obamacare
chunks.chinese: 在解释与奥巴马医改的联系之前
值得作出一个重要区分

sentence_patterns.explanation: it 是形式主语，真正主语是 making an important distinction。

original: Many people who work part-time jobs actually want full-time jobs.
translation_literal: 许多从事兼职工作的人实际上想要全职工作。

chunks.english: Many people who work part-time jobs
chunks.chinese: 许多从事兼职工作的人

original: They take part-time work because this is all they can get.
translation_literal: 他们从事兼职工作，因为这是他们所能得到的全部。

chunks.english: because this is all they can get
chunks.chinese: 因为这是他们所能得到的全部

original: An increase in involuntary part-time work is evidence of weakness in the labor market and it means that many people will be having a very hard time making ends meet.
translation_literal: 非自愿兼职工作的增加是劳动力市场疲软的证据，并且这意味着许多人将很难维持生计。

chunks.english: An increase in involuntary part-time work
chunks.chinese: 非自愿兼职工作的增加

chunks.english: evidence of weakness in the labor market
chunks.chinese: 劳动力市场疲软的证据

chunks.english: and it means that many people will be having a very hard time making ends meet
chunks.chinese: 并且这意味着许多人将很难维持生计

chunks.english: that many people will be having a very hard time making ends meet
chunks.chinese: 许多人将很难维持生计

chunks.english: of weakness in the labor market
a very hard time making ends meet

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: A is... and it means that...
sentence_patterns.explanation: 两个分句并列，前者说明证据性质，后者说明后果。

original: There was an increase in involuntary part-time in June, but the general direction has been down.
translation_literal: 6月份非自愿兼职有所增加，但总体方向一直是下降的。

chunks.english: There was an increase in involuntary part-time in June
but the general direction has been down
chunks.chinese: 但总体方向一直是下降的

original: Involuntary part-time employment is still far higher than before the recession, but it is down by 640,000(7.9 percent) from its year ago level.
translation_literal: 非自愿兼职就业仍然远高于经济衰退前，但它比一年前的水平下降了64万（7.9%）。

chunks.english: still far higher than before the recession
chunks.chinese: 仍然远高于经济衰退前

chunks.english: but it is down by 640,000 (7.9 percent) from its year ago level
chunks.chinese: 但它比一年前的水平下降了64万（7.9%）

original: We know the difference between voluntary and involuntary part-time employment because people tell us.
translation_literal: 我们知道自愿和非自愿兼职就业之间的区别，因为人们告诉了我们。

chunks.english: the difference between voluntary and involuntary part-time employment
chunks.chinese: 自愿和非自愿兼职就业之间的区别

original: The survey used by the Labor Department asks people if they worked less than 35 hours in the reference week.
translation_literal: 劳工部使用的调查会询问人们在参照周内是否工作少于35小时。

chunks.english: The survey used by the Labor Department
if they worked less than 35 hours in the reference week
chunks.chinese: 他们在参照周内是否工作少于35小时
chunks.relation: 作 asks 的宾语内容

original: If the answer is “yes”, they are classified as working part-time.
translation_literal: 如果答案是“是”，他们就被归类为兼职工作。

chunks.relation: 作 classified as 的内容

original: The survey then asks whether they worked less than 35 hours in that week because they wanted to work less than full time or because they had no choice.
translation_literal: 然后该调查询问他们在那一周工作少于35小时，是因为他们想少于全职工作，还是因为他们别无选择。

chunks.english: whether they worked less than 35 hours in that week
chunks.chinese: 他们在那一周是否工作少于35小时

chunks.english: because they wanted to work less than full time
chunks.chinese: 因为他们想少于全职工作

chunks.english: or because they had no choice
chunks.chinese: 或者因为他们别无选择

sentence_patterns.explanation: 两个 because 从句并列，区分自愿兼职与非自愿兼职。

original: They are only classified as voluntary part-time workers if they tell the survey taker they chose to work less than 35 hours a week.
translation_literal: 只有当他们告诉调查员他们选择每周工作少于35小时时，他们才被归类为自愿兼职工作者。

chunks.relation: 作 classified as 的内容

chunks.english: if they tell the survey taker they chose to work less than 35 hours a week
chunks.chinese: 如果他们告诉调查员他们选择每周工作少于35小时

chunks.english: they chose to work less than 35 hours a week
chunks.chinese: 他们选择每周工作少于35小时
chunks.relation: 作 tell 的宾语内容

chunks.english: because they wanted to work less than full time
chunks.chinese: 因为他们想少于全职工作

chunks.english: to work less than full time

key_phrases.meaning: 调查员，接受调查者登记的人

original: The issue of voluntary part-time relates to Obamacare because one of the main purposes was to allow people to get insurance outside of employment.
translation_literal: 自愿兼职的问题与奥巴马医改有关，因为其主要目的之一是允许人们在就业之外获得保险。

chunks.relation: 作 relates to 的宾语

chunks.english: because one of the main purposes was to allow people to get insurance outside of employment
chunks.chinese: 因为其主要目的之一是允许人们在就业之外获得保险

original: For many people, especially those with serious health conditions or family members with serious health conditions, before Obamacare the only way to get insurance was through a job that provided health insurance.
translation_literal: 对许多人来说，尤其是那些有严重健康问题或家庭成员有严重健康问题的人，在奥巴马医改之前，获得保险的唯一方式是通过一份提供健康保险的工作。

chunks.english: For many people, especially those with serious health conditions or family members with serious health conditions
chunks.chinese: 对许多人来说，尤其是那些有严重健康问题或家庭成员有严重健康问题的人

chunks.english: the only way to get insurance
through a job that provided health insurance
chunks.chinese: 通过一份提供健康保险的工作

sentence_patterns.explanation: especially those... 补充说明 many people 的重点群体，主干是 the only way... was through a job。

original: However, Obamacare has allowed more than 12 million people to either get insurance through Medicaid or the exchanges.
translation_literal: 然而，奥巴马医改已经使超过1200万人能够通过医疗补助或交易所获得保险。

chunks.english: to either get insurance through Medicaid or the exchanges
chunks.chinese: 通过医疗补助或交易所获得保险
chunks.relation: 补充说明 people 能做的事

chunks.english: the need to get a full-time job

original: These are people who may previously have felt the need to get a full-time job that provided insurance in order to cover themselves and their families.
translation_literal: 这些人是以前可能觉得需要获得一份提供保险的全职工作，以便为自己和家人提供保障的人。

chunks.english: who may previously have felt the need to get a full-time job that provided insurance in order to cover themselves and their families
chunks.chinese: 以前可能觉得需要获得一份提供保险的全职工作以保障自己和家人的

chunks.english: in order to cover themselves and their families
chunks.chinese: 为了保障他们自己和家人

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 定语从句中嵌套定语从句和目的状语
sentence_patterns.explanation: who 从句很长，内部又含 that provided insurance 和 in order to...，需分层理解。

original: With Obamacare there is no longer a link between employment and insurance.
translation_literal: 有了奥巴马医改，就业和保险之间不再有联系。

chunks.english: there is no longer a link between employment and insurance
chunks.chinese: 就业和保险之间不再有联系
